name: premiere-ai-agent-workspace
description: Premiere MCP 剪辑助手，面向 Claude Code、Codex 和 OpenClaw，可结合文档、参考视频、提示词和本地素材目录完成视频剪辑规划与执行，当前更适合粗剪与初版装配。

scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace packages/audio-beat-mcp --workspace packages/video-research-mcp --workspace packages/premiere-mcp
scripts.test: npm run test:packages && node scripts/run-node-tests.mjs test
scripts.test:packages: npm run test --workspace packages/audio-beat-mcp --workspace packages/video-research-mcp --workspace packages/premiere-mcp
